title: プロパティの出どころカウント

cases.name: 通常のオブジェクトとObject.prototype
同名プロパティは自身を優先

input.factory: () => { const prototype = { category: "base", shared: true }; const target = Object.create(prototype); target.name = "alpha"; target.category = "own category"; return { target, keys: ["name", "category", "shared", "lost"] }; }

cases.name: Object.prototypeを継承しないオブジェクト

input.factory: () => { const target = Object.create(null); target.code = "N0"; return { target, keys: ["code", "toString", "hasOwnProperty"] }; }

cases.name: 値がundefinedでも存在を数える

input.factory: () => { const prototype = { inheritedValue: undefined }; const target = Object.create(prototype); target.ownValue = undefined; return { target, keys: ["ownValue", "inheritedValue", "absent"] }; }

cases.name: 自身のtoStringはownとして数える

input.factory: () => { const target = { toString: "custom", count: 3 }; return { target, keys: ["toString", "hasOwnProperty", "count"] }; }
() => { const target = Object.create({ base: 1 }); target.local = 2; return { target, keys: [] }; }
